title: Politics Test
content: Once again I can't sleep (actually, already slept and already woken up), so I decided to look around and found this [politics test](http://www.okcupid.com/politics). The test basically based on American politic but I guess it does work over here too. And without further ado, here's my result. I'm somewhat surprised to see that I'm almost on the center line. I've always thought that I lean toward the top right. [sarc] I'm right on Gorby's head! :P But I'm certainly not on anyone's **nominee** list. By the way, I said agree to this one. And I disagree with this one. That will be a controversy. But anyway, give [the test](http://www.okcupid.com/politics) a try if you have too much time in your hand or just can't sleep like myself. Have a good day. :)
